description_long: This object is a compact, antique-style shotgun with a single, long, cylindrical barrel and a robust wooden grip. The barrel is metallic, dark gray in color, and features a simple band near the midpoint, likely for reinforcement. The grip is made of polished wood, smoothly contoured for ergonomic handling, and extends into a rounded, pistol-like shape. The trigger and trigger guard are metallic, with the guard being rounded and proportionally sized to the grip. The hammer and firing mechanism are visible above the grip, suggesting a break-action or single-shot design. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional, durable materials.
description: A compact, antique-style shotgun with a single long barrel and a polished wooden pistol grip. The design is simple and functional, with visible metallic and wooden components.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden grip, metallic barrel, and trigger assembly.
description_view_1: Front view down the barrel, emphasizing the circular muzzle and the alignment of the barrel with the grip below.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the smooth wooden grip and the metallic barrel, with the hammer and trigger mechanism visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the rounded wooden grip and the alignment of the barrel above it.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, long cylindrical barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
